_comment: Tier-2 Layer-C: NGSolve poisson numerical-correctness gate. Mirrors fenics + skfem. Runs the catalog-recommended NGSolve API surface (Mesh(unit_square.GenerateMesh(maxh)), H1 with dirichlet='boundary', BilinearForm + LinearForm + Assemble, a.mat.Inverse(fes.FreeDofs())) end-to-end against the same MMS. Asserts order=1 maxh=1/16 L2 <= 7e-3, order=2 <= 5e-5, order=3 <= 1e-6, P1 EOC maxh=1/8 → 1/16 in [1.5, 2.5] (wider than fenics/skfem because Netgen meshes are unstructured: two maxh values produce different mesh topologies so the rate can over- or under-shoot 2.0 by a larger margin than on a Cartesian mesh). Verified against NGSolve 6.2.2604 on 2026-06-01: P1=2.79e-3, P2=3.89e-5, P3=4.94e-7, EOC=2.270.
